title: Mr. Potato Head
description: Build your own Mr. Potato Head that will enhance you when sitting in your offhand!
body: This mod adds Mr. Potato Head, where you can add different body parts to it, giving you multiple effects when held in offhand. To add a body part: hold Mr. Potato Head in your offhand and right click with body part in your right hand. To remove body parts: Throw Mr. Potato Head! Admittedly, this mod is not finished, and we would've liked to add: 1. More body part types (nose, mouth, eyes, like the irl Mr. Potato Head) 2. Better textures and dynamic model for Mr. Potato Head 3. More varied effects (potion effects for example)
